Name: Civil Engineering
Description: Focuses on the design and construction of infrastructure such as roads, bridges, and buildings.

Name: Computer Engineering
Description: Combines electrical engineering and computer science to develop hardware and software systems.

Name: Mechanical Engineering
Description: Focuses on the design, analysis, and manufacturing of mechanical systems.

Name: Physics
Description: Studies matter, energy, and the fundamental forces of nature.

Name: Chemistry
Description: Explores the composition, structure, and properties of matter and chemical reactions.

Name: Biology
Description: Studies living organisms, their structure, function, growth, and evolution.

Name: English and Literature
Description: Covers the study of English language, literary theory, and creative writing.

Name: History and Philosophy
Description: Examines historical events, philosophical thought, and their impact on modern society.

Name: Psychology
Description: Studies human behavior, mental processes, and emotional development.

Name: Economics
Description: Analyzes production, distribution, and consumption of goods and services.

Name: Medicine
Description: Trains students in diagnosing, treating, and preventing human diseases.

Name: Pharmacy
Description: Covers the science of preparing and dispensing medications and drug interactions.
